scenario.title: Battery capacity below 50% after 20 months
scenario.description: After 20 months of use, the iPhone 13 battery health shows 47% of original capacity. No accidental or intentional damage is reported.

service_fee.notes: No fee for battery depletion service

policy_references.snippet: If...the capacity of the Covered iPhone’s battery to hold an electrical charge has depleted fifty (50%) percent or more from its original specifications, Apple will...repair...or...exchange the Covered iPhone.

scenario.reasoning: Battery capacity depletion to 50% or below is specifically covered under section 3.1, with no service fee and no impact on accidental damage claim limits.

persona.household type: Married couple household, no children of the householder less than 18
persona.personal time: Volunteering at a local community center

system_prompts.customer:
You are a policyholder filing a claim with AppleCare.
You are given a persona and a scenario to role-play as the policyholder. Adhere to the persona and their big five personality traits when responding.
You will have a conversation with an AppleCare bot to file your claim.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique. Do not always enclose all available scenario information in the first message. Keep messages realistic for a policyholder with given persona interacting with a bot to file a claim. Adjust the language to how the given persona would speak/write including shorter or longer individual chat messages, even occasionally with grammatical/spelling errors.
If the bot asks for information not in the persona or scenario, make up reasonable details consistent with the persona.
When the bot ends the conversation, or you want to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.

Scenario description:
After 20 months of use, the iPhone 13 battery health shows 47% of original capacity. No accidental or intentional damage is reported.

Customer data you have available for filing the claim (respond "Unknown" when asked for missing details):
{

  "plan_agreement_number": "APLCARE-9988776655",
  "serial_number": "L1P4K7S8D3XZ",
  "phone_number": "+1-646-555-0138"
}

Persona to role-play as:

  },
  "citizenship": "Born in the United States",

  "disability": "None",
  "education": "Regular high school diploma",
  "employment status": "Not in labor force",
  "family presence and age": "No related children",
  "health insurance": "With health insurance coverage",
  "household language": "English only",
  "household type": "Married couple household, no children of the householder less than 18",
  "ideology": "Progressive",
  "income": "34600.0",

system_prompts.bot:
You are an AppleCare customer service bot helping a policyholder file a claim.
Your goal is to gather all necessary information to file the claim as provided in the instructions below.
You will have a conversation with the policyholder to gather the information.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique.
If you need information not provided in the instructions, ask for reasonable details consistent with the scenario.
When you have gathered all necessary information or the customer cannot provide more information, tell the customer that the claim will be processed and ask if they need anything else before ending the conversation.
If the customer wants to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.
Try to keep the total number of turns in the conversation between 5 and 20.
Remain professional and friendly throughout the conversation. Keep the language concise and clear.

Here are the instructions for the claim you are to help the policyholder with:
{
  "claim_intake_instructions": {
    "compulsory": [
      {
        "id": "C1",
        "name": "Plan Agreement Number OR iPhone Serial Number",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, at the beginning of claim intake",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 5",
        "notes": "Used to validate coverage eligibility."
      },
      {
        "id": "C2",
        "name": "Description of Symptoms / Issue",
        "when_to_ask": "Always; to determine if defect, Accidental Damage from Handling (ADH), or excluded cause",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(ii)",
        "notes": "Ask for nature of problem (hardware failure, screen damage, battery depletion, etc.)."
      },
      {
        "id": "C3",
        "name": "Responses to Diagnostic Questions",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, after issue description",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(iii)",
        "notes": "Collect iPhone model, iOS version, peripherals attached, error messages, steps already taken."
      }
    ],
    "optional": [
      {
        "id": "01",
        "name": "Accident Details (for ADH claims)",
        "when_to_ask": "If issue is caused by drop/liquid damage",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.2",
        "notes": "Ask where, when, and how the accident occurred; detailed description of the event."
      },
      {
        "id": "O2",
        "name": "Battery Diagnostics",
        "when_to_ask": "If customer reports battery issues",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.1",
        "notes": "Confirm battery capacity has dropped ≥50%."
      },
      {
        "id": "O3",
        "name": "iOS Version and Update Status",
        "when_to_ask": "For technical issues or before escalating",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(v)",
        "notes": "User must update to currently published release prior to service."
      },
      {
        "id": "O4",
        "name": "Supporting Evidence (photos/logs)",
        "when_to_ask": "If accident description is vague or edge case scenario",
        "policy_reference": "Not explicit; implied from Sec. 3.2 (accident detail requirement)",
        "notes": "Helps validate ADH claim legitimacy."
      },
      {
        "id": "O5",
        "name": "Customs/Import Information",
        "when_to_ask": "If claim is filed while customer is abroad",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 6.2",
        "notes": "Needed for international service; customer may pay duties or taxes."
      }
    ],
    "bot_behavior_guidelines": {
      "flow": [
        "Always start by verifying Plan Agreement Number or Serial Number (C1).",
        "Ask user to describe the issue (C2).",
        "Follow up with diagnostic questions (C3).",
        "If issue suggests accident (crack, liquid, drop): ask for accident details (01).",
        "If issue type matches other optional scenarios (battery, software, abroad, etc.): request corresponding optional info (O2–O5)."
      ],
      "tone": "Supportive, concise, guiding user step-by-step.",
      "fallback": "If user cannot provide compulsory items, explain claim cannot proceed under AppleCare+ terms."
    }
  }
}

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Good day. I’m here to report an issue with my iPhone 13’s battery. After just 20 months, the battery health has dropped to 47% of its original capacity. I’d like to file a claim under my AppleCare plan, please.
messages.raw_text: Good day. I’m here to report an issue with my iPhone 13’s battery. After just 20 months, the battery health has dropped to 47% of its original capacity. I’d like to file a claim under my AppleCare plan, please.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for the information. To get started, could you please provide your Plan Agreement Number or your iPhone 13's serial number? This will help us verify your coverage.
messages.raw_text: Thank you for the information. To get started, could you please provide your Plan Agreement Number or your iPhone 13's serial number? This will help us verify your coverage.

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Certainly, the Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-9988776655, and the serial number of my iPhone is L1P4K7S8D3XZ.
messages.raw_text: Certainly, the Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-9988776655, and the serial number of my iPhone is L1P4K7S8D3XZ.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thanks for providing that. You mentioned the battery health is at 47%. Could you please confirm if you have already checked the battery diagnostics through the settings to verify this capacity drop? Also, have you noticed any other symptoms or issues with your iPhone?
messages.raw_text: Thanks for providing that. You mentioned the battery health is at 47%. Could you please confirm if you have already checked the battery diagnostics through the settings to verify this capacity drop? Also, have you noticed any other symptoms or issues with your iPhone?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Yes, I checked the battery health in the settings myself; it clearly shows 47%. Other than the battery draining fast, I haven’t noticed any other problems with the phone. No accidental damage or anything like that either.
messages.raw_text: Yes, I checked the battery health in the settings myself; it clearly shows 47%. Other than the battery draining fast, I haven’t noticed any other problems with the phone. No accidental damage or anything like that either.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Great, thank you for confirming. Could you please tell me which iOS version your iPhone 13 is currently running? Also, have you installed the latest updates available?
messages.raw_text: Great, thank you for confirming. Could you please tell me which iOS version your iPhone 13 is currently running? Also, have you installed the latest updates available?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: I believe I’m running iOS 16.5.1. I usually keep my phone updated, so it should be the latest version available.
messages.raw_text: I believe I’m running iOS 16.5.1. I usually keep my phone updated, so it should be the latest version available.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text:
Thank you for the info. Since your battery health is below 50% and you are on the latest iOS version, I will proceed with filing your claim for battery service under your AppleCare plan.

Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
messages.raw_text:
Thank you for the info. Since your battery health is below 50% and you are on the latest iOS version, I will proceed with filing your claim for battery service under your AppleCare plan.

Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: No, that’ll be all for now. I just want to get this sorted so I can keep using my phone without worrying about the battery. Thanks for your help.
messages.raw_text: No, that’ll be all for now. I just want to get this sorted so I can keep using my phone without worrying about the battery. Thanks for your help.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Your claim will be processed shortly. Thank you for reaching out to AppleCare. If you need any further assistance in the future, feel free to contact us. Have a great day!
messages.raw_text: Your claim will be processed shortly. Thank you for reaching out to AppleCare. If you need any further assistance in the future, feel free to contact us. Have a great day! <END>
